title: GSSSB Notification 2026 - Apply Online for 43 Junior Geologist Posts
description: The Gujarat Subordinate Service Selection Board (GSSSB) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 43 Junior Geologist Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech, Post-graduation, can apply for the GSSSB Notification 2026. The interested applicants can apply in online mode. Here we have mentioned the education details, age limit, select...
